activation_sequence.scope: in-app alerts only; no external delivery channel
simulation only; contract not yet drafted

acceptance_notes: Human gate owner approved the P6 proposal on 2026-07-22 with activation order 3 (in-app alerts) -> 5 (paper trading simulation) -> 2 (delayed provider feed).
Capability 3 contract is defined and scoped strictly to in-app alerts; external delivery channels (email, webhook, push, SMS) remain unapproved and each requires a separate human gate.
Capabilities 5 and 2 are approved_next only; their contracts are intentionally not drafted until capability 3 completes its evidence chain.
Capabilities 1, 4, and 6 are deferred: not approved, not activated; no work may begin on them under this approval.
Automatic order placement remains prohibited; no order route, order command, or order UI control is created or authorized.
This evidence records an approval and a contract only; no alerts functionality is implemented. Implementation requires human approval of the hashed work-unit draft.
The approved P4 boundary is unchanged and p4_research_closure.py passes.
